content.full_text:
February 15, 1980


Kirk Alan Peasner
Dobbs & Nielsen
Suite 2500, the Alcoa Building
One Maritime Plaza
San Francisco, CA 94111

Dear Mr. Peasner:

Enclosed is a copy of my response to an inquiry
by Mr. William Hudson about certain filing problems
under Government Code Section 84204, in which you
expressed an interest.

Sincerely,


Joan Ciangello
Staff Services Analyst

JC:ph

February 15, 1980


William Hudson
Orrick, Herrington, Rowley
& Sutcliffe
Twelfth Floor
500 Montgomery St.
San Francisco, CA 94111

Dear Mr. Hudson:

You have asked whether a major donor otherwise required
to file a year-end semi-annual campaign statement must also
file a post qualification drive statement under Government
Code section 84204 that is due by the terms of that section
after the first of the succeeding year. The answer to your
question is no, providing that all of the following conditions are met:

     (1) All contributions and expenditures in connection
         with the ballot measure qualification drive were
         made by the closing date of the year-end semi-
         annual statement;

     (2) No contributions and expenditures in connection
         with the ballot measure qualification drive are
         anticipated to be made after the closing date of
         the semi-annual statement;

     (3) All contributions and expenditures in connection
         with the ballot measure qualification drive are
         disclosed on the year-end semi-annual statement;

     (4) The year-end semi-annual statement is designated
         as filed in fulfillment of the obligation under
         Section 84204 to file in connection with the quali-
         fication of a measure;

     (5) The year-end semi-annual statement is filed with
         every office with which a statement pursuant to
         Section 84204 would have to be filed; and

William Hudson
February 15, 1980
Page Two

(6) The year-end semi-annual statement is filed on or
before the deadline for filing in connection with
the qualification of a ballot measure pursuant to
section 64204.

The designation required in (4) can be accomplished by
attaching a "Declaration of Final Campaign Statement," form
400, with reference to the qualification drive, to the year-
end semi-annual statement.

Sincerely,


John Glansello
Staff Services Analyst

JGrplh
